source_layout: 4x2 atlas, seven occupied cells and one empty cell
processing: border-sampled soft matte, despill and alpha conversion
prompt_summary: Seven full-body survivor game pictograms in a consistent elevated top-down dark-arcade style, aligned to screen-cardinal axes with controlled body depth and no isometric floor plane: Mira ranger, Dante gunslinger, Bruna berserker, Kael swordsman, Elio mage, Nina tamer with Briciola, and Rocco werewolf; no text, uniform chroma-key background.
